Tutorial 4: Comparing to EM Simulations (coming soon)¶

This tutorial will show how to import Touchstone / FEM results and compare them to simpleLOMs circuit models.

Planned topics:

  • Loading measured or simulated .s2p files with scikit-rf

  • Aligning port definitions and reference impedance with analyze_system inputs

  • Using circle-fit helpers from simpleLOMs.analysis on imported data

  • Quantifying residual error with the same metrics as analyze_system

For now, use Tutorial 1 for single-device fitting and Tutorial 2 for accuracy mapping.

[ ]:

# Placeholder — no executable content yet
print("Tutorial 4 is under development.")
